List.Title: Automations List
List.Description: List of automations in Power Automate and TDX iPaaS. This list is updated automatically every night. Administrators can run flow manually as needed, and can use this list as a reference to see dependencies so they can now which SharePoint lists or which other flows would be affected by a change to a flow.
List.Name: {0B99E612-688F-4C41-8AF7-593A3D249628}

Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The name or title of this automation.
The system used to create this flow.
Field.Name: AutomationSystem
Field.Title: Automation System

Field.Description: The type of flow, usually the same as the type of trigger.
Field.Name: FlowType
Field.Title: Flow Type

Field.Description: The ID of the environment to be used in URLs.
Field.Name: FlowEnvironment
Field.Title: Flow Environment

Field.Description: A short description of what this automation does.
Field.Name: FlowDescription
Field.Title: Flow Description

Field.Description: The URL that can be used for launching this flow.
Field.Name: FlowURL
Field.Title: Flow URL

Field.Name: TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
Field.Name: Notes
Field.Title: Notes

Field.Description: List of SharePoint Lists that this flow uses.
Field.Name: SharePointLists
Field.Title: SharePoint Lists Used

Field.Description: Child flows used by this flow.
Field.Name: SubFlows

Field.Description: Code for this flow, if available. This is typically formatted as JSON.
Field.Name: Code
Field.Title: Code

Field.Description: Indicates whether this flow is active (turned on).
Field.Name: Active
Field.Title: Active
